programme.title: Framed by My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Shayna Hubers
programme.desc: Holly Nivens details how Shayna manipulated her into believing it was self-defense.

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Abused as a child, a woman embarks on a quest to discover her true identity and biological origins.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: A couple welcome a surrogate mother into their lives, only to discover she's a con artist.

programme.title: Switched Before Birth
programme.desc: A couple learn that one their two new babies was implanted into the wife by mistake.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal With Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: A college admissions scandal ensnares celebrities and prominent individuals.

programme.desc: Abused as a child, a woman embarks on a quest to discover her true identity and biological origins.

programme.title: Snatched From the Crib
programme.desc: A woman searches for her murdered stepsister's missing baby, risking it all to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Buying Back My Daughter
programme.desc: A couple try to buy back their daughter to rescue her from the trafficker who abducted her.

programme.title: My Kidnapped Son
programme.desc: Released from prison, a woman tries to find out where her child vanished to while she was away.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story With Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.
